app.name: ClaudeQuest
health.title: Platform status
health.error: Could not reach the server. Please try again shortly.
health.success: All good! The backend is up.
auth.login.title: Sign in to ClaudeQuest
auth.login.subtitle: Use the credentials provided by your organization.
auth.login.errors.accountNotActive: This account isn't active. Contact your administrator.
auth.login.errors.generic: Couldn't sign you in right now. Please try again shortly.
auth.forgotPassword.title: Reset your password
auth.forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a recovery link, if it's registered.
auth.forgotPassword.success: If that email is registered, you'll receive a recovery link shortly.
auth.resetPassword.title: Set a new password
auth.resetPassword.subtitle: Choose a new password for your account.
auth.resetPassword.success: Password changed successfully. You can now sign in with your new password.
auth.resetPassword.missingToken: Invalid recovery link. Please request a new one.
auth.resetPassword.errors.tooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters long.
auth.resetPassword.errors.invalidToken: This recovery link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new one.
auth.resetPassword.errors.generic: Couldn't change your password right now. Please try again shortly.
